resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived MCM6/LCT rs4988235 CT call is available for lactase-persistence context. This is not a diagnosis, symptom explanation, diet recommendation, supplement recommendation, or model-derived health result.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This marker can provide lactose-related context, but symptoms, diet history, labs, environment, medications, and professional review matter for health and nutrition decisions.

resultRows.sourceLabel: MedlinePlus DTC result limits / Nutritional genomics review
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report can describe supplied marker context, but it should not make diet, supplement, glucose, gut, weight, wellness, child-specific, symptom, lab, metabolic, or treatment conclusions without validated evidence.

gutHealthContext: Use this report as educational gut-health-adjacent nutrition genetics context, not as a digestive diagnosis or microbiome result.
Discuss symptoms, food history, labs, microbiome questions, and nutrition goals with qualified professionals.
Do not eliminate foods, start supplements, interpret labs, or change treatment based on genotype alone.

references.title: Nutritional Genomics and Direct-to-Consumer Genetic Testing
MedlinePlus Genetics: What DTC genetic test results mean

uncertainty: Nutrition, lifestyle, symptoms, labs, weight, glucose, gut health, supplement response, and wellness outcomes depend on genetics plus non-genetic context and professional review.
A single marker should not be used to diagnose conditions, explain symptoms, prescribe diets, recommend supplements, interpret labs, or guide treatment.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The report is educational and does not diagnose digestive disorders, infer microbiome status, diagnose lactose intolerance, explain symptoms, prescribe elimination diets, recommend supplements, interpret labs, or provide treatment guidance.
